unresolved_same_name.name: traffic

evidence_refs.quote: traffic was a factor this period

unresolved_same_name.why: Each side has exactly one ref, and both quotes are semantically empty: child_a (AAA) "traffic was a factor this period" and child_b (BBB) "traffic trends were mixed". Neither identifies the object (store/foot/web/network traffic), scope, or mechanism, so none of the three union checks (same object/metric, same scope, same mechanism) can be verified — SAME cannot be asserted. DIFFERENT also fails: there is no evidence of two distinct meanings, and the quotes contain no specific nouns from which more-specific names could be coined without inventing words (banned by DriverOntology R4/R10). Fail-close: park as UNCLEAR.
